detail.description: Davis Schneider singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Spencer Jones, deflected by shortstop Anthony Volpe.
Davis Schneider homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Davis Schneider singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Brandon Valenzuela scores. Myles Straw to 2nd.
Davis Schneider singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Austin Martin. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.
Davis Schneider doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Matt Wallner. Jesús Sánchez scores.
Davis Schneider singles on a line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston. Myles Straw scores. George Springer to 3rd. Davis Schneider to 2nd.
Davis Schneider homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Jesús Sánchez scores.
Davis Schneider doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Davis Schneider doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Kazuma Okamoto scores. Nathan Lukes to 3rd.
Davis Schneider homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.
Davis Schneider hits a ground-rule double (2) on a line drive to left-center field. Myles Straw to 3rd.
Davis Schneider singles on a ground ball to left fielder Riley Greene.
Davis Schneider singles on a ground ball to left fielder Austin Hays.
Davis Schneider doubles (3) on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Trevor Larnach. Lenyn Sosa scores. Daulton Varsho scores. Myles Straw to 3rd.
Davis Schneider singles on a fly ball to right fielder Matt Shaw.
